person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Beatrix married first, about 1186 and divorced about 1197, to Etienne, comte d'Auxonne. 

Beatrix married second, before 1200, to Guillaume des Barres, as his second wife.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Châlon於大約1170年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o時，她的父親Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone31歲，母親Beatrix von Hohenstauffen19歲。她於1187年與Etienne de Auxonne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1227年4月7日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易享年58歲，埋葬在法國布格薩o-吉洛易沙吉阿布易爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Châlon于大约1170年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o时，她的父亲Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone31岁，母亲Beatrix von Hohenstauffen19岁。她于1187年与Etienne de Auxonne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1227年4月7日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易享年58岁，埋葬在法国布格薩o-吉洛易沙吉阿布易爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Châlon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Yves, Francois, Valmore.
French: variant of   Charron   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Charron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Donat, Lucien, Marcel, Alphonse, Emile, Laurent, Normand, Renald, Yves, Adrien.

French: metonymic occupational name for a cartwright, from Old French charron ‘cart’ (from Latin carro, genitive carronis, a derivative of carrum ‘cart’). Compare Charon , Sharon , Sharron , and Sharrow .

History: Pierre Charron dit Ducharme from Meaux in Seine-et-Marne, France, married Catherine Pillard in Montreal, QC, in 1665; see also Ducharme . Jean Charron dit Laferrière from Saintes in Charente-Maritime, France, married Anne d'Anneville in Quebec City, QC, in 1669; see also Laferriere . Charles Charron dit Larose and Cabanac from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Élisabeth Poupard in Montreal, QC, in 1713.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Châlon was born about 1170, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone, was 31 and her mother, Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, was 19. She married Etienne de Auxonne in 1187. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 7 April 1227, in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Châlon est née environ 1170, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Etienne de Auxonne en 1187. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 avril 1227, à Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Châlon um 1170 in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone 31 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Hohenstauffen 19. Sie hat 1187 Etienne de Auxonne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. April 1227 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Châlon è nata il circa 1170 nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Etienne de Auxonne nel 1187. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 7 aprile 1227, nel Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Châlonが約1170年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンで生まれた時，父Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saoneは31歳，母Beatrix von Hohenstauffenは19歳であった。1187年にEtienne de Auxonneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1227年4月7日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーで58歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーサイント-アンブレウイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Châlon(이)가 대략 1170년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Hohenstauffen(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1187년 Etienne de Auxonne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 4월 7일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 세인트-아브레우일에 묻혔다.

pt.1200: de 8 de janeiro de 1200 a 7 de janeiro de 1201
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Châlon nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Etienne de Auxonne em 1187. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de abril de 1227, em Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Châlon родилась около 1170 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Etienne de Auxonne в 1187 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 7 апреля 1227 г. в местности саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-амбреуил, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Châlon nació aproximadamente 1170, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume II Count de Chalon-sur-Saone, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Hohenstauffen, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Etienne de Auxonne en 1187. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 7 de abril de 1227, en Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Ambreuil, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia.
